taxGuide.title: French Investment Tax Guide 2025 — Free Simulators | Go React Starter
taxGuide.description: Interactive French investment tax guide. Compare PFU vs progressive tax, simulate PEA timeline, calculate PMP capital gains. Free tools for French investors.

taxGuidePfu.title: PFU vs Progressive Tax 2025 — Simulator | Go React Starter
taxGuidePfu.description: Compare France PFU flat tax (31.4%) vs progressive brackets for capital gains. Interactive simulator with 2025 rates, social charges, and personalised advice.

taxGuidePeaSimulator.title: PEA Tax Advantage Simulator — 10-Year Projection | Go React Starter
taxGuidePeaSimulator.description: Simulate PEA tax savings over 10 years. Compare taxation before and after the 5-year threshold vs standard brokerage. Free tool, no sign-up.

taxGuidePeaWithdrawal.title: PEA Withdrawal Tax 2025 — Calculator | Go React Starter
taxGuidePeaWithdrawal.description: Calculate taxes on PEA withdrawals: gain ratio, social charges, income tax before and after 5 years. Free interactive simulator for French investors.

taxGuideCapitalGains.title: PMP Capital Gains Calculator — Simulator | Go React Starter
taxGuideCapitalGains.description: Calculate capital gains using PMP (weighted average cost), the method mandated by French tax law. Add buy lots, simulate a sell, and see the step-by-step breakdown. Free tool.

taxGuideDividends.title: Dividend Tax 2025 — Simulator | Go React Starter
taxGuideDividends.description: Simulate taxation on French and foreign dividends. Compare PFU vs progressive tax, calculate tax credits and withholding tax. Free interactive simulator.

taxGuideForms.title: Tax Forms Guide for French Investors 2025 — Interactive Quiz & Boxes | Go React Starter
taxGuideForms.description: Which French tax forms do you need? Take our interactive quiz to get a personalized checklist. Covers 2042, 2074, 2047, 2042-C, 3916, 2778-DIV with box-level detail and official links.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: Go React Starter is committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable data protection laws.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.intro: We collect and process the following categories of personal data:
dataCollected.email: Email address (for account identification and communication)
dataCollected.password: Hashed password (using bcrypt encryption for security)
dataCollected.preferences: User preferences (language, currency, country, tax settings)
dataCollected.brokerAccounts: Broker account information (name, account number, account type)
dataCollected.tradeData: Trade data (stock symbols, quantities, prices, dates, fees)

purposes.title: Purpose of Data Processing
purposes.intro: We process your personal data for the following purposes:
purposes.tax: Tax calculations and reporting (informational purposes only)

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.intro: We process your data based on:
legalBasis.contractDesc: Processing is necessary to provide the services you have requested through your user agreement with Go React Starter
legalBasis.legitimateInterestDesc: We have a legitimate interest in implementing security measures to protect your account and data

hosting.title: Hosting and Third-Party Services
hosting.azureDesc: All user data is stored within the European Union, ensuring EU data residency compliance
hosting.eodhdDesc: We use this service to retrieve stock price data. Only stock symbols are sent to this service—no personal data is transmitted
hosting.cloudflareDesc: We use Cloudflare for content delivery and DDoS protection. Cloudflare is GDPR-compliant and operates within EU data protection standards
hosting.umamiDesc: We use Umami for privacy-focused, cookieless website analytics. Umami does not collect personal data, does not use cookies, and is fully GDPR-compliant

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal data for as long as your account remains active. You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting us at {{email}}. Upon receipt of a deletion request, we will permanently delete your data from our systems.

rights.title: Your Rights Under GDPR
rights.intro: Under Articles 15-22 of the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
rights.accessDesc: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
rights.rectificationDesc: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data
rights.erasureDesc: You can request deletion of your personal data (account deletion)
rights.portabilityDesc: You can request your data in a portable format to transfer to another service
rights.objectDesc: You can object to the processing of your personal data
rights.restrictionDesc: You can request that we limit how we use your data
rights.complaintDesc: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés (CNIL), the French Data Protection Authority

security.title: Data Security
security.intro: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal data, including:
security.encryption: Encryption of sensitive data (passwords, backup codes)
security.https: Secure HTTPS connections for all data transmission

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions, concerns, or requests regarding your personal data or this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
contact.responseTime: We will respond to your request within 30 days as required by GDPR regulations.

financial.title: Financial Disclaimer
financial.bold: Go React Starter is NOT a financial advisor, NOT investment advice, and NOT a broker or trading platform.
financial.content: All information provided by Go React Starter is for educational and informational purposes only. You should consult with qualified financial professionals before making any investment decisions.

tax.title: Tax Disclaimer
tax.bold: Tax calculations provided are ESTIMATES only and NOT official tax advice.
tax.content: You MUST verify all tax-related information with a qualified tax professional or accountant. Guigui Factory is not liable for any errors in tax calculations. You are responsible for the accuracy of all data you enter into Go React Starter.

serviceDescription.title: 1. Service Description
serviceDescription.intro: Go React Starter is a portfolio investment tracking tool designed to help users:
serviceDescription.centralize: Centralize investment data from multiple brokers
serviceDescription.tax: Obtain tax estimation features specifically for French investors

accountResponsibilities.title: 2. Account Responsibilities
accountResponsibilities.intro: By creating an account, you agree to:
accountResponsibilities.security: Maintain the security of your account credentials
accountResponsibilities.age: Be at least 18 years of age or have parental consent
accountResponsibilities.oneAccount: Maintain only one account per person
accountResponsibilities.notify: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account

acceptableUse.title: 3. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.agreeIntro: You agree to use Go React Starter only for:
acceptableUse.lawful: Lawful activities in compliance with applicable laws
acceptableUse.scraping: Use automated scraping, bots, or unauthorized API access
acceptableUse.unauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
acceptableUse.illegal: Use the service for any illegal activities
acceptableUse.interfere: Interfere with or disrupt the service or servers

freeTier.title: 4. Free Tier Terms
freeTier.content: Go React Starter is currently provided free of charge. We reserve the right to introduce paid subscription tiers in the future. If we do so, we will provide advance notice to existing users, and continued use of the service will constitute acceptance of any new pricing terms.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: Go React Starter is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to:
liability.merchantability: Warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose
liability.accuracy: Accuracy, reliability, or completeness of information
liability.damages: Guigui Factory and Go React Starter shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to financial losses, lost profits, or loss of data arising from your use of or inability to use the service.

dataAccuracy.title: 6. Data Accuracy
dataAccuracy.content: You are solely responsible for the accuracy and completeness of all data you enter into Go React Starter. While we strive to provide accurate calculations and information, we make no guarantees regarding the accuracy of portfolio valuations, performance metrics, or tax estimates.

thirdParty.title: 7. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: Go React Starter may integrate with third-party services (such as broker platforms or market data providers). We are not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or practices of these third-party services. Your use of such services is subject to their respective terms of service and privacy policies.

modifications.title: 8. Service Modifications and Termination
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of Go React Starter at any time, with or without notice. We may also terminate or suspend your account for violation of these terms or for any other reason at our sole discretion.

governingLaw.title: 9. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of France, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of Go React Starter shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or through the service. Continued use of Go React Starter after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: 11. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our support channels or visit

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, images, and software, is the property of Guigui Factory or its content suppliers and is protected by international copyright laws. The compilation of all content on this site is the exclusive property of Guigui Factory.
intellectualProperty.trademarks: Go React Starter and the Go React Starter logo are trademarks of Guigui Factory. All other trademarks referenced herein are the property of their respective owners.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information accurate and up to date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability of the website or the information, products, services, or related graphics contained on the website.

links.title: External Links
links.content: This website may contain links to external websites. We have no control over the content and nature of these sites and are not responsible for their content or privacy practices.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable Law
applicableLaw.content: This legal notice is governed by French law. Any disputes arising from the use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the French courts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding this legal notice, please contact us at:

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.intro: In accordance with French law (Loi pour la Confiance dans l'Économie Numérique - LCEN), this page provides legally required information about Go React Starter.
